chief_complaint: A young male presents with acute neurological symptoms and signs of hyperthyroidism.
history: The patient has no prior history of thyroid disease. Thyrotoxicosis is associated with a hypercoagulable state, increasing the risk of thrombotic events like CVST.
exam: No specific vital signs or physical examination findings are provided.
labs: No specific investigations or results are provided, but the patient is diagnosed with deep cerebral venous sinus thrombosis (CVST).
correct_diagnosis: Cerebral Venous Sinus Thrombosis (CVST) complicated by Thyroid Storm
differentials: Cerebral Venous Sinus Thrombosis (CVST) complicated by Thyroid Storm
correct_ranking: Cerebral Venous Sinus Thrombosis (CVST) complicated by Thyroid Storm
